description_long: This is a two-story bungalow surrounded by a low, white perimeter wall and featuring a spacious yard with both paved and grassy areas. The structure has a prominent hip roof clad in reddish-brown tiles, with wide eaves providing shade to the upper and lower balconies. Large, blue-tinted windows are symmetrically arranged on all visible sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front entrance is accentuated by a covered porch supported by columns, and there are multiple access points to the yard via gates and steps. The property includes paved driveways and walkways, as well as a fenced side area that could serve as a garden or patio. The overall design is clean and modern, with a focus on symmetry and outdoor living space.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a hip tile roof, large blue windows, and a white perimeter wall enclosing paved and grassy yards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and symmetrical window arrangement with the hip roof overhead.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, side yard, and additional balcony access, with the roof's overhang visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, paved area, and a clear view of the upper and lower balconies.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more windows, a secondary entrance, and the continuation of the perimeter wall and yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
